All the above-mentioned posts will be functional during the period proposed by the Department.
The posts shall be sanctioned as per the pattern and shall not be vacant for a period exceeding six months.
Also, the positions will not have expired.
The positions at the converted establishment will continue to operate as long as the employee is employed in that position.
